body.raw:
{
  "context": {
    "action": "on_support",
    "bap_id": "{{bap_id}}",
    "bap_uri": "{{bap_uri}}",
    "bpp_id": "{{bpp_id}}",
    "bpp_uri": "{{bpp_uri}}",
    "message_id": "{{$guid}}",
    "network_id": "beckn:retail-network:in",
    "timestamp": "{{$isoTimestamp}}",
    "transaction_id": "{{transaction_id}}",
    "version": "{{version}}",
    "ttl": "PT30S"
  },
  "message": {
    "supportInfo": {
      "@context": "https://schema.beckn.io/",
      "@type": "beckn:SupportInfo",
      "name": "Pizzeria Roma Customer Care",
      "channels": [
        "PHONE",
        "EMAIL",
        "WHATSAPP"
      ],
      "telephone": "+918001234567",
      "email": "support@pizzeria-roma.example.com",
      "url": "https://pizzeria-roma.example.com/support",
      "hoursAvailable": "Mon–Sun, 10:00 AM – 11:00 PM IST",
      "callbackStatus": "REQUESTED"
    }
  }
}
